title: Ambulance Vehicle Record
description: Optional per-vehicle record nested under a provider. v1 typically populates the rolled-up fleet_count_claimed on the provider instead; this schema is used when individual vehicle data is known.

id.description: Stable slug, unique within the provider's fleet.

registration_number.description: RTO registration. We do not publish this in v1 (privacy-friendly default) even when known.

type.description: BLS=Basic Life Support; ALS=Advanced Life Support; MICU=Mobile Intensive Care Unit; PTA=Patient Transport; Neonatal=for newborns; Cardiac=cardiac-equipped; Mortuary=non-emergency transfer of deceased.
